title: turnera lanceolata
intro: Turnera lanceolata, also known as Damiana, is a shrub-like plant native to the Americas that belongs to the Turneraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Turnera lanceolata include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual cramps, as well as increased libido and improved digestion. The plant can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, with some herbalists also using it to make salves and topical creams for skin issues.
